product.name: ArWoWear T2 Chem Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 260 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 260 g/m², 100% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T2 Chem Pro is light weight 260 g/m², vat dyed, chemical resistant,100% cotton merserized workwear fabric.
It is usefull for outdoor summer working conditions.
With water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 260 gr/m'2
260 g/m², 100% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Has 'emi' property (EMI shielding related term) but no explicit electrical/energy-sector application stated; chemical resistance and workwear coverall use are the stated applications, not energy sector.

stage1.noMatchReason: This is a 100% cotton, vat-dyed, chemical-resistant twill workwear fabric intended for coveralls in outdoor summer working conditions, resistant to industrial chemicals (EN ISO 13034) with water/oil repellency. No explicit military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building or transport use is stated.

evidence: categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
It is usefull for outdoor summer working conditions.
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly for coveralls and chemical-resistant industrial workwear, with no narrower named sector (e.g. firefighting, welding, energy) stated despite chemical resistance property. This fits general industrial protective workwear.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is explicitly supported; chemical resistance and EMI-related property are part of the same workwear use, not a distinct sector.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Only an 'emi' property tag present, no explicit electrical/energy-sector use stated.
No explicit welding, foundry or metallurgy use stated; chemical resistance is generic industrial, not metal-splash specific.
Mention of 'outdoor summer working conditions' refers to workwear context, not leisure/outdoor apparel.
